Monday.morning_preparing: Warm water with lemon, 5 soaked almonds, 2 walnuts, 1 tbsp soaked black raisins
Monday.breakfast: 2 moong dal cheela with mint chutney and 1 bowl curd
Monday.mid_day_meal: 2 multigrain roti, 1 bowl rajma, palak sabzi, salad with lemon
Monday.dinner: 100g tofu sabzi with 1-2 roti and sautéed beetroot
Monday.11pm_reminder: Soak black chana and almonds for Tuesday

Tuesday.morning_preparing: Warm water with lemon, pumpkin seeds (1 tbsp), soaked raisins
Tuesday.breakfast: Vegetable paneer bhurji (100g paneer) with 2 multigrain roti
Tuesday.mid_day_meal: Brown rice, chole curry, methi sabzi, cucumber salad with lemon
Tuesday.dinner: Mixed dal with 2 roti and stir-fried broccoli
Tuesday.11pm_reminder: Soak moong dal and raisins for Wednesday

Wednesday.morning_preparing: Warm water, 5 soaked almonds, 1 tbsp flaxseed powder
Wednesday.breakfast: Oats cooked in milk with chia seeds and peanut butter
Wednesday.mid_day_meal: 2 roti, black chana curry, palak sabzi, carrot salad with lemon
Wednesday.dinner: Soy chunks curry with 1-2 roti and sautéed spinach
Wednesday.11pm_reminder: Soak rajma, almonds and keep milk + lemon ready for paneer (Thursday)

Thursday.morning_preparing: Warm lemon water, walnuts, soaked raisins
Thursday.breakfast: Sprouts salad with chopped vegetables and 1 glass buttermilk
Thursday.mid_day_meal: Brown rice, masoor dal, bhindi sabzi, salad with lemon
Thursday.dinner: Paneer (100g) with mixed vegetable sabzi and 1-2 roti
Thursday.11pm_reminder: Soak chole and raisins for Friday

Friday.breakfast: Besan cheela (2-3) with mint chutney and 1 fruit (guava/orange)
Friday.mid_day_meal: 2 multigrain roti, rajma curry, methi sabzi, salad
Friday.dinner: Tofu stir fry with vegetables and 1-2 roti
Friday.11pm_reminder: Soak black chana and flaxseed; keep milk + lemon ready for paneer (Sunday)

Saturday.morning_preparing: Warm lemon water, flaxseed powder, soaked raisins
Saturday.breakfast: Vegetable upma with peanuts and 1 bowl curd
Saturday.mid_day_meal: Brown rice, chole, palak sabzi, beetroot salad
Saturday.dinner: Mixed dal with 2 roti and sautéed broccoli
Saturday.11pm_reminder: Soak moong dal and almonds for Sunday

Sunday.morning_preparing: Warm water with lemon, almonds, walnuts
Sunday.mid_day_meal: 2 roti, black chana curry, methi sabzi, salad with lemon
Sunday.dinner: Soy chunks curry with sautéed spinach and 1-2 roti
Sunday.11pm_reminder: Soak rajma and raisins for Monday
